title: BedWars+ (Hypixel)
description: Pack for Hypixel Bedwars that gives many items unique textures depending on their usage
body:
![showcase image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2f56d900cb534fa0276db486cc5facda56c75a3.png)

## Summary

This pack gives many items in Hypixel Bedwars unique, a more readable textures, so you can know what items do at a quick glance.

## FAQ:

<details>
<summary>What dream modes does this support?</summary>

Currently this pack supports lucky blocks mode and armed mode, though neither of these are finished, and support for more modes will be added in the future (althought not soon)
  
</details>

<details>
<summary>Will there be a [Latest Release] version?</summary>
  
Yes, forwardporting is planned, but due to 1.20.5 changing how items work, this pack is not possible until optifine and cit resewn update.
</details>

Did this not answer your question? Did you find a bug and want to report it? You can reach out to me on my socials!
